Example Research Question: Does swallow mass differ across different SITEs?
Do SITE and MONTH (and their interaction) predict swallow mass?
Do SITE, MONTH, and BROODPATCH predict swallow mass?
Does the variation in mass among individual BIRDS (Nested) differ within each SITE?
Does MONTH (Whole Plot) affect MASS, and do different SITEs (Sub-Plot) respond differently? (Often applied in agriculture/ecology)
Does swallow mass change significantly across Time (e.g., baseline, 1 month, 2 months)?

ANOVA Types: Repeated measures ANOVA with one within-groups factor (W) and one between-groups factor (B)
Example Research Question: Does the change in mass over Time (W) differ between birds from different SITE (B)s?
